task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Approval Queue** (Level 7)

Build an approval queue. Employees submit requests (title, description, amount). The request starts as 'pending'. A logged-in approver can update the status to 'approved' or 'rejected' (this requires auth). Need: POST /api/requests (public submit), GET /api/requests (list all), GET /api/requests/pending (filtered list), PUT /api/requests/:id (update, auth required).

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

allow signup and login
owner is 'owner@example.com'

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  description
  amount (number), default 0
  status, default 'pending'

# Public submit endpoint
when user sends request to /api/requests:
  validate request:
    title is text, required
  saved = save request to Requests
  send back saved with status 201

# List all requests
when user calls GET /api/requests:
  send back all Requests

# List pending requests only
when user calls GET /api/requests/pending:
  send back all Requests where status is 'pending'

# Update request status (requires auth)
when user sends changes to /api/requests/:id:
  requires login
  save changes to Requests with this id
  send back changes

# Frontend page
page 'Approval Queue' at '/':
  requests_list = []
  pending_list = []

  section 'Submit Request' with style app_card:
    heading 'Submit Request'
    'Title' as text input saved as req_title
    'Description' as text area saved as req_desc
    'Amount' as number input saved as req_amount

    button 'Submit':
      send { title: req_title, description: req_desc, amount: req_amount } as a new record to '/api/requests'
      call GET /api/requests
      set requests_list to result
      set req_title to ''
      set req_desc to ''
      set req_amount to 0

  on page load get requests_list from '/api/requests'

  section 'All Requests' with style app_card:
    heading 'All Requests'
    display requests_list as list

  section 'Pending Requests' with style app_card:
    heading 'Pending Approval'
    display pending_list as list

    button 'Refresh Pending':
      call GET /api/requests/pending
      set pending_list to result
